metadata.description: Photo and video portfolio by Ethan Frati — portraits, food, architecture, events, street photography, product shoots. Based in Paris.

projects.pageIntro: A curated list of photo and video projects. Click on a project to read the full description and browse the associated media.
projects.metadataDescription: Discover the photo and video projects in the portfolio.
projects.emptyGallery: No media for this project yet. Add photos, YouTube or Instagram links in the admin panel.

about.intro: I tell visual stories through photography and video. My approach favours natural light, clean composition, and artistic direction that stays true to each project's identity.
about.bio: Based in Paris, passionate about photography and video in my spare time.

photo.title: Photo
photo.description: Portraits, architecture and product shoots, street photography.

video.title: Video
video.description: Food social content, product ads, events.

about.contactIntro: For a photo project, video shoot or collaboration, reach out directly. I reply within 48 hours.
